decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id project_s79-sbs-launch-2012 exactly matches the existing registry record project_s79-sbs-launch-2012. The observation resolves to its own record; the source flyer 'S79 Select Bus Service Begins September 2, 2012' confirms the same project identity (project_name: 'S79 Select Bus Service', project_type: 'Select Bus Service', launched Sept 2012 on Hylan Blvd in Staten Island).
